## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan the creation of an article on generative engine optimization for GrowthX's new publication.](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Article focus: Intro to generative engine optimization (GEO), current state, key questions, and areas of development](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Target audience: Experienced marketers (few years of experience)](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Timeline: Draft review on June 12th, final article due June 23rd](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Content approach: Jason's voice, authoritative yet accessible, translating complex AI concepts for marketers](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)

## Topics

### Publication Overview

  - [GrowthX's publication aims to build audience through content, convert to signups/revenue](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Focus on candid, transparent conversations with people who've done interesting work](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Topics: growth marketing, go-to-market strategies](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Style: Raw tactics and actions, not promotional content](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

### Article Structure and Content

  - [Written from Jason's voice, \~1500 words](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Current state of GEO, where teams should focus efforts, future of the space](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Will serve as an introduction, with potential for expanded articles later](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Jason to provide Loom recordings and notes on key topics](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Genevieve to create initial structure for Jason to fill with information](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [80% of content likely from Jason, with input from team members](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Async collaboration through Notion, Loom recordings, and soundbites](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)

### Timeline and Milestones

  - [Podcast episode release: \~June 18th](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Article draft review: June 12th](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [Final article publication: June 23rd](https://fathom.video/share/QtUZWVzfAHx5-RxBDmMDu21T2tvoGioy?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

### Reference Materials
